name: diagnose-codex-desktop-lag
description: Diagnose Windows Codex Desktop lag and apply one confirmed, reversible repair at a time.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose and safely repair Codex Desktop lag on Windows
interface.longDescription: Run isolated read-only diagnostics for CPU, GPU, I/O, SQLite, logs, threads, rollouts, temporary files, workspaces, WSL, and display drivers before applying one confirmed and reversible repair.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Diagnose Codex Desktop Lag to run a complete read-only diagnosis before proposing one repair.
